case_title: SAN FRANCISCO POSTAL CREDIT UNION VS YEE LINDA T

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY SAN FRANCISCO POSTAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT YEE LINDA T ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 01
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT YEE LINDA T

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO POSTAL CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YEE LINDA T $1,662.59 PRINCIPAL, $51.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,713.59 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT TO DEF.RETURNED. POSTAL EMPLOYEES NOT PERMITTED TO RECEIVE MAIL AT WORK LOCATION.
